title: Human / Friend
tagline: Coffee Enthusiast, Gamer, and Life Adventurer
description: Get to know me outside the IDE. I love talking about gaming, coffee, travel, and sci-fi movies.
about: Hey there! I'm Nokib. Beyond compiling code and writing articles, I'm just a guy who enjoys a freshly brewed cup of pour-over coffee, playing cooperative role-playing games, and traveling to quiet mountain terrains. I believe the best parts of life happen off-screen, usually accompanied by good friends and a great soundtrack.

voiceNote.transcript: Hey! Thanks for stopping by this corner of the site. I built this part because resumes and portfolios can feel so sterile. If you're ever in my city, let's grab a coffee. I'm always down to chat about the latest sci-fi movie or just share some good vibes.

timeline.title: Trek to Sajek Valley
timeline.description: A week-long trekking journey through the beautiful clouds of Sajek. Discovered a new love for high altitudes.

timeline.title: First Mechanical Keyboard
timeline.description: Fell down the rabbit hole and built a custom 65% keyboard. My fingers have never been happier, though my wallet disagrees.

timeline.title: Adopted a Cat (or she adopted me)
timeline.description: Luna walked into my apartment and decided it was hers now. The best lockdown companion.

timeline.title: Graduation Trip
timeline.description: Backpacked across three countries with my best friends. We got lost twice, but the food was incredible.

timeline.title: First Line of Code
timeline.description: Wrote my first HTML script. It was terrible, but seeing 'Hello World' on screen changed my life trajectory.
